title: crepidomanes rothertii
intro: Crepidomanes rothertii, also known as Rothert's basket fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Crepidomanes rothertii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential as a medicinal plant.
